name: a-nice-terminal
description: A web and API interface for terminal and conversation sessions, with MCP integration for humans and AI agents

scripts.dev: node scripts/preflight.mjs && cd packages/app && node --env-file=../../.env --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.start: node scripts/preflight.mjs && cd packages/app && node --import tsx server/index.ts
scripts.lint: cd packages/app && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../mcp && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: cd packages/app && npx vitest run && cd ../mcp && npx vitest run
